mission: Pray 12 Sunnah Rak'ahs along with Farz Salah.
challenge: Do not delay any prayer.
Stop yourself from backbiting.
Listen to Quran instead of music.

mission: Ask your parents for their Dua.
challenge: Stop scrolling social media.
Don't complain about fasting.
Tell no lies, even in jokes.

mission: Pray for more confidence & hard work.
challenge: Don't shout at your family.

mission: Give food to a fasting person.
challenge: Don't waste any food at Iftar.
No phone for 1 hour after Iftar.

mission: List 10 things you are thankful for.
challenge: Do Dhikr instead of sleeping after Suhoor.
Avoid being sarcastic or mean.

mission: Forgive someone who hurt you in past.
challenge: Mind your own business.
Don't spend money on fun things.
Don't overeat at Iftar.
Stop putting off your chores.
Be patient in traffic or lines.
Don't complain about the food.
Stay quiet more than you talk.
Stop saying bad things to yourself.
Don't buy things you don't need.
No distractions after Isha.
Keep your cool while fasting.
Focus fully on your Dua time.
Don't be lazy with your work.

mission: Give a gift to a neighbor.
challenge: Don't be jealous of others online.
Don't show off your good deeds.
Avoid all useless arguments.
Don't rush your prayers.

mission: Tell your family you love them.
challenge: Keep your energy high until the end.
Don't go back to old bad habits.
